    Digital Lending Notice

    Due to the lingering effect of COVID-19 pandemic 2nd wave on our economy, our company had decided to waived off the entire loan amount below Rs. 25000, in case loan was sanctioned before 31st December 2020. Therefore, Customers of Rhino Finance who are in above loan limit are not required to make a repayment of loan.

    Rhino finance is not associated with any lending apps now, further we had provided NOC to the customers on their registered email id, who availed loan us.

    This has come to our notice that some of digital lenders are using our name and claiming that they are associated with us. This is to further inform you that we have lodged an FIR bearing no. 0456/2021 against the fake lending application, in furtherance of the said FIR, police had successfully caught two scamster and the case is under investigation.

    Therefore it is requested that kindly do not believe on or indulged with any digital application which are using our NBFC name as we have completely ceased / suspended our operations pertains to the disbursement and collection of loan from December 2020 and presently there are no digital lending applications of our NBFC in the market, if we launch any digital lending application we will duly notify the same on our official website (Website link- [email protected]) .

    Read More

    Start Your Application

    100% data privacy,Zero Spam

    Get SME Business loan upto Rs 10. Lakhs

    Avail SME loan for your Small/medium-size business via our Rhino Finance App in a hassle-free environment and grow your business with flying colours

    Download Application

    Firstly, you need to download the application form and enter details such as your name, address, age, loan amount, duration, along with a scanned copy of Aadhaar Card or other ID Proof

    Get SME Loan Approval by our Experts

    Our finance experts at Rhino Finance will take charge of the verification of all the particulars shared by you. Amount of loan and duration are the two factors that are taken into consideration for the duration of approval.

    Grab the Loan Amount Now!

    Rhino Finance Team will complete the verification process, and you will get the loan amount in your bank account.

     

    Faq`s

    Q.1 In how much time you will get the loan?
    The approval of the application form is instant. Once the approval is granted from our end, it is usually disbursed on the same day.
    Q.2 What are the required documents?
    Scan copy of the ID proof like Aadhaar Card or Pan Card and your signature.
    Q.3 Do I require any collateral in favor of the loan?
    No, any such collateral is not required for a small amount of loan.
    Q.4 What is the rate of interest?
    The rate of interest varies upon the loan amount.
    Q.5 What are the purposes for which I can avail of the loan?
    Rhino Finance never asks for purposes. It can be any of your reasons. No matter whatever be the purpose, Rhino Finance is always with you.
    Q.6 Do we need a guarantor for borrowing the loan?
    No guarantor is required for any kind of loan. Be it a personal loan, an Unsecured loan, an installment loan, or any other kind.
    Q.7 What is the Notable Feature of This App?
    The most notable feature of this app is that you will get the loan amount in a hassle-free manner, and you will be able to take your small/medium-size business to new heights. We ensure smooth and less time-consuming lending policies.

    Our Customer Loves Us

    Akash Kumar
    Student

    I was running short of finance due to some unexpected expenses. I got to know about Rhino Finance from one of my friend and i tried with this and got the loan within 1 hour. Their services are very good and easy to use.

    I do not have words to describe their easy to use services. I got a loan within some clicks. I would recommend Rhino Finance to everyone who need loan.

    I took a student loan from Rhino Finance. Getting a loan from Rhino Finance is easy as taking money from friends thank you Rhino Finance.
